email_body:
Beste mevrouw/meneer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Brand Media Intern bij Levi Strauss & Co. in Brussel. Uw oproep voor ‘originals’ spreekt mij aan: ik combineer een technische basis in web en SEO met een groeiende interesse in media en campagnes.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met on-page SEO, contentcreatie en WordPress. Ik coördineer met externe partijen en beheer meerdere projecten tegelijk. Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring met gestructureerde data en het optimaliseren van zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines. Deze vaardigheden sluiten aan bij de ondersteuning van betaalde mediacampagnes en de coördinatie van assets.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen om te verbeteren). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel om drie dagen per week op kantoor in Brussel te werken.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Brand Media Intern position at Levi Strauss & Co. in Brussels. Your call for ‘originals’ resonates with me: I combine a technical background in web and SEO with a growing interest in media and campaigns.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with on-page SEO, content creation, and WordPress. I coordinate with external parties and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I have experience with structured data and optimizing visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. These skills align with supporting paid media campaigns and coordinating assets.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons to improve). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible to work three days per week at the Brussels office.

I look forward to discussing my motivation and experience in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw/meneer,

Toen ik de vacature voor Brand Media Intern bij Levi Strauss & Co. zag, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw oproep voor ‘originals’ past bij wie ik ben: iemand die zijn eigen pad kiest, techniek en creativiteit combineert, en altijd leergierig is. Ik wil graag bijdragen aan de iconische merkcampagnes van Levi’s.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, keyword-gericht bloggen en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk samen met het team om content te optimaliseren en prestaties te meten via tools als SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Analytics. Deze ervaring leert mij gestructureerd werken, deadlines halen en schakelen tussen verschillende projecten — vaardigheden die direct relevant zijn voor het ondersteunen van de Brand Media Manager.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Dit gaf mij inzicht in hoe media en content zichtbaar worden in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines. Ik begrijp daardoor het bredere media-ecosysteem en hoe offline en online kanalen elkaar versterken.

U zoekt iemand met sterke organisatievaardigheden, affiniteit met mode en begrip van de Duitse markt. Hoewel ik geen Duits spreek, ben ik cultureel nieuwsgierig en leer ik snel. Mijn Engels is professioneel, en mijn Nederlands (B1) verbeter ik actief met lessen. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel om hybride te werken.

Ik zou graag mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek toelichten. Bedankt voor uw overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

When I saw the Brand Media Intern vacancy at Levi Strauss & Co., I immediately felt a connection. Your call for ‘originals’ fits who I am: someone who chooses their own path, combines technical and creative skills, and is always eager to learn. I would love to contribute to Levi’s iconic brand campaigns.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword-focused blogging, and building/maintaining WordPress sites. I collaborate with the team to optimize content and measure performance using tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Analytics. This experience teaches me structured work, meeting deadlines, and switching between projects — skills directly relevant to supporting the Brand Media Manager.

Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). This gave me insight into how media and content become visible in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I therefore understand the broader media ecosystem and how offline and online channels reinforce each other.

You are looking for someone with strong organizational skills, affinity with fashion, and understanding of the German market. Although I do not speak German, I am culturally curious and a fast learner. My English is professional, and my Dutch (B1) I actively improve with lessons. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible for hybrid work.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation and experience in an interview. Thank you for your consideration.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Experience coordinating with external agencies and managing multiple projects simultaneously (Episto).
Proven ability to support campaign execution through content management, SEO, and performance tracking (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics).
Understanding of the media ecosystem: on-page SEO, structured data, and GEO for visibility across traditional and AI-powered channels.
Strong organizational skills: building and maintaining WordPress sites, managing content flows, and meeting deadlines.
Based in Zwijndrecht (near Antwerp), flexible for hybrid work in Brussels; fluent English, B1 Dutch (actively improving).
tailored_cv:
# Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
